title: Does the monday.listen api listens to any changes that happens in the work docs?
excerpt: We are trying to build a solution which constantly needs to listen to the work docs changes. Does the monday.listen api or the webhooks provide the ability to listen to changes in work docs?

posts.author: antfarmsoft (Ant farm Software)
posts.cookedHtml: We are trying to build a solution which constantly needs to listen to the work docs changes. Does the monday.listen api or the webhooks provide the ability to listen to changes in work docs?

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: Not sure, but with a smattering of html & js it’s trivial to build a simple proof of concept that adds monday.listen and you can display what changes in the widget.

posts.author: antfarmsoft (Ant farm Software)
posts.cookedHtml:
@dvdsmpsn Thank you for your response. I’m seeking some clarification regarding the monday.listen API. From my understanding, it doesn’t seem to provide events for Monday’s Work Docs feature. However, I wanted to double-check if I might be missing something or if there’s any additional information you could provide on this matter. Any insight or guidance you can offer would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Screenshot 2024-03-23 at 10.52.19 PM865×418 42.4 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @antfarmsoft and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You are correct. The monday.listen SDK method does not listen to changes in workdocs. If you want, I can turn this into a feature request

posts.author: antfarmsoft (Ant farm Software)
posts.cookedHtml: Sure, it would definitely help us with some of the workflows that we are trying to solve. Could you also provide a way to track the status of this once the feature request has been created? Thanks for your help @Matias.Monday

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @antfarmsoft,

I have changed this into a feature request! Everyone can now vote for it on the top left corner of the screen!

If this gets implemented we will announce it here (and in our documentation and changelog as well)

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: antfarmsoft (Ant farm Software)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks! Looking forward to it!

posts.author: wnm (Wolfram Müller)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love webhooks for changes in workdocs as well, otherwise for my kind of app, I would have to poll the api every few seconds to check for changes…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @wnm for your vote!!
